Welcome

Legacy Chiropractor

Legacy Chiropractor has been serving Boulder and the surrounding region with premium chiropractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Boulder Trusts Legacy Chiropractor

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Sports Injury Recovery

Boulder's rugged terrain and active population demand specialized sports injury care. We treat common local injuries inc...

Prenatal Chiropractic

Boulder's active expectant mothers deserve specialized prenatal care. Our Webster-certified practitioners provide safe, ...

Pediatric Chiropractic

From crawling babies to competitive teen athletes, we provide age-appropriate chiropractic care for Boulder's youth. Our...

Auto Injury Recovery

Boulder's mix of urban traffic and mountain roads leads to unique auto injury patterns. We specialize in treating whipla...

Posture Correction

Between desk jobs in Boulder's tech scene and students hunched over books at CU, poor posture is prevalent in our commun...

Contact Us →
“
After tweaking my knee on the Royal Arch trail, Dr. Hart had me back on the trail in half the expected time. She understood exactly how Boulder's terrain impacts recovery and tailored my treatment accordingly. The elevation-specific advice made a real difference.
— Mark T.
